landing.title: The Memory Palace
landing.subtitle: Where Your Life Story Comes Alive

hero.label: YOUR LIFE STORY, BEAUTIFULLY ALIVE
hero.headline: Your family's stories are worth more than a photo album. Build the place where they truly come alive.
hero.description: A 3D palace you and your family can walk through together — filled with your photos, voices, and stories. Not a cloud drive. A living, breathing home for everything that makes your story yours.

features.title: Not storage. A living experience.
features.subtitle: Six ways your memories come alive.
features.palace3dDesc: Walk through your life like a museum. Each wing holds a chapter — childhood, family, travels — with your photos and videos displayed as art on the walls.
features.aiInterviewsDesc: A gentle interviewer asks the questions your grandchildren would ask. It draws out the stories behind your photos — the ones you almost forgot, and the ones only you can tell.
features.cloudImportDesc: Connect Google Photos, Dropbox, or OneDrive. AI sorts 10,000 photos into the right rooms in minutes. What would take you months happens while you have coffee.
features.timeCapsuleDesc: Write a letter to be opened in 2050. Seal a message for your grandchild's wedding day. Some words mean more when they arrive at the right moment.
features.sharingDesc: Your daughter adds her wedding photos. Your brother adds that holiday video from 1998. Three generations, one shared palace. Distance disappears.
features.legacyDesc: Choose who gets the keys. Record video messages for the moments that matter. Write the letters you keep meaning to write. Your palace is always ready, whenever the time is right.

howItWorks.title: Getting started
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps. Five minutes.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Answer a few questions about the chapters of your life. We build personalized wings and rooms around your story — not someone else's template.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Upload photos and videos, speak your stories aloud, or import from the cloud. AI places everything in the right room — you just relive the moments.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Hand them the key to your palace. They can explore your life in 3D, add their own memories, and help build something no family album ever could.

comparison.subtitle: Because no one explores a cloud account together

comparison.row2Right: Every photo paired with the story behind it
comparison.row3Right: A shared palace your whole family builds together
comparison.row4Right: Shared keys, time capsules, sealed letters for special moments
comparison.row5Right: An immersive 3D walkthrough of a life
comparison.row6Right: Auto-organizes, describes, and tags thousands of photos

audience.title: Who it's for
audience.subtitle: For anyone who believes their story deserves more than a folder
audience.keepersDesc: You have decades of memories scattered across devices and shoeboxes. Turn them into something your grandchildren will walk through with wonder.
audience.guardiansDesc: You want your voice, your stories, and your wisdom to be shared with the people who matter most. A palace makes that effortless.
audience.archivistsDesc: You have 50,000 photos and no plan. Let AI organize a lifetime of images into rooms that finally make sense.

testimonials.title: Why families build palaces
testimonials.subtitle: In their own words
testimonials.quote1: After my husband passed, I was terrified the memories would fade. Now my grandchildren walk through our palace and ask me to tell them the stories. It feels like he is still here with us.
testimonials.quote2: I recorded a message for each of my children, sealed until their wedding day. I don't know when that will be. But I know the words will be there, waiting.
testimonials.quote3: My mother has early-stage dementia. We built her palace from old photo albums. On her good days, walking through the rooms brings back stories none of us had ever heard.
testimonials.quote4: Three decades of family photos — 15,000 images across four devices. The AI sorted everything in under an hour. I sat there watching rooms fill up and just cried.

cta.title: The best time to relive a memory is right now
cta.description: Free to start. No credit card. Your palace is waiting.

footer.about: Every life story deserves a place that does it justice. The Memory Palace turns your photos, voices, and stories into a 3D experience your family can walk through — together, from anywhere.
footer.copyright: The Memory Palace. Your story, beautifully alive.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: The Memory Palace is a 3D virtual space where you can preserve and organize your most precious memories — photos, videos, stories — in beautifully designed rooms that your family can walk through together.
faq.a2: Absolutely. We use bank-grade encryption, EU-hosted infrastructure, and are fully GDPR compliant. Your memories are protected with the highest security standards.
faq.q3: Can I share my palace with family?
faq.a3: Yes! You can invite family members to explore your palace, contribute their own memories, and co-create shared rooms. Three generations can build together in one space.
faq.q4: What's included in the free plan?
faq.a4: The free plan includes your own 3D palace with five wings, up to 500 memories, basic AI organization, and the ability to share with up to 3 family members. Upgrade anytime for more.

pricing.headline: Simple, Honest Pricing
pricing.description: Start free. Upgrade when you need more space for your memories. All paid plans include a 14-day free trial.
pricing.faq1a: Absolutely. No lock-in, no penalties. Cancel from your account settings and keep access until the end of your billing period.
pricing.faq2q: What happens to my memories if I downgrade?
pricing.faq2a: Your memories are never deleted. You will just not be able to add new ones until you are within the free plan limits.
pricing.faq3a: Yes. All data is stored on EU-hosted infrastructure with encryption at rest and in transit. We are committed to GDPR compliance.
pricing.faq4a: The Guardian plan includes family sharing, allowing up to 5 family members to contribute to your palace.

tutorial.tourTitle: Take a guided tour of your Memory Palace
tutorial.tutorial.steps.welcome.title: Welcome
tutorial.tutorial.steps.welcome.message: Welcome to your Memory Palace — a living home for your most treasured memories. Let me show you how everything works.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.navigation.title: Navigation Basics
tutorial.tutorial.steps.navigation.message: Use WASD or arrow keys to walk. Drag to look around. Click on doors and objects to interact. On mobile, use the joystick to move and swipe to look.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.entrance_hall.title: The Entrance Hall
tutorial.tutorial.steps.entrance_hall.message: This grand hall is the heart of your palace. Five doorways lead to the wings of your life — each one a gallery for a different chapter. Look for the wing names on each door.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.five_wings.title: The Five Wings
tutorial.tutorial.steps.five_wings.message: Family, Travel, Childhood, Career, and Creativity — each wing is a corridor lined with rooms. Walk through a door to explore.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.attic.title: Storage Room
tutorial.tutorial.steps.attic.message: There's also a special place called the Storage Room — a catch-all space for memories that don't fit neatly into a wing yet. We'll explore that more later.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.inside_wing.title: Inside a Wing
tutorial.tutorial.steps.inside_wing.message: Each wing corridor has doors to individual rooms. Paintings on the walls preview what's inside. The wing's name is displayed as a fresco at the far end.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.rooms_memories.title: Rooms & Memories
tutorial.tutorial.steps.rooms_memories.message: Inside each room, your memories are displayed as paintings, videos, albums, glowing orbs, and more. Click any memory to view it in detail.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.adding_memories.title: Adding Memories
tutorial.tutorial.steps.adding_memories.message: Use the + button to upload photos, videos, or documents. You can also drag and drop files, or use Mass Import to add many at once.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.sharing.title: Sharing
tutorial.tutorial.steps.sharing.message: Every room can be shared with loved ones. Use the Share button to invite family and friends to view or contribute their own memories.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.action_menu.title: The Action Menu
tutorial.tutorial.steps.action_menu.message: Look for the floating action button in the bottom-right corner. It gives you quick access to adding memories, managing rooms, and more features.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.life_interviews.title: Life Interviews
tutorial.tutorial.steps.life_interviews.message: Try our AI-guided Life Interviews — they help you capture stories through conversation, available from the action menu or the More menu on mobile.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.tracks_achievements.title: Tracks & Achievements
tutorial.tutorial.steps.tracks_achievements.messa: Complete Memory Building Tracks to earn points and unlock achievements. Check your progress in the status bar at the bottom.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.closing.title: Ready to Explore
tutorial.tutorial.steps.closing.message: You're all set! Walk through any door to begin. You can always retake this tour from the 'Take the Tour' button. Now go — your memories are waiting.

securityPage.heroDescription: We understand that your memories are irreplaceable. Here is exactly how we protect them — with transparency, care, and the highest standards.
securityPage.hostingVercelDetail: Your Memory Palace runs on Vercel, a world-class hosting platform with a global content delivery network (CDN). Every page loads fast, and every connection is automatically secured with HTTPS.
securityPage.hostingEuDetail: All your data is stored on Supabase PostgreSQL in Frankfurt, Germany — safely within the European Union. This means your memories are protected by strict EU data protection laws (GDPR).
securityPage.hostingGdprLabel: We are committed to GDPR compliance
securityPage.hostingGdprDetail: We follow the General Data Protection Regulation to the letter. Your personal data is processed lawfully and transparently, and only for the purposes you have agreed to.
securityPage.encryptionTransitDetail: Every connection between your device and our servers uses TLS 1.2 or higher, ensuring strong transport encryption. Nobody can read your data as it travels over the internet.
securityPage.encryptionRestDetail: Your database is encrypted with AES-256, the same standard used by banks and governments. Even if someone accessed the physical servers, your data would be unreadable.
securityPage.encryptionFilesDetail: Your photos, videos, and documents are stored in Supabase Storage, which is also encrypted at rest. Files are only accessible through authenticated, time-limited links.
securityPage.encryptionPasswordDetail: Your password is never stored in plain text. It is hashed using bcrypt through Supabase Auth, making it practically impossible to reverse-engineer.
securityPage.authEmailDetail: Sign in securely with your email address and password. Your credentials are handled by Supabase Auth, a battle-tested authentication system.
securityPage.authSocialDetail: Prefer to sign in with Google or Apple? We support OAuth 2.0 social login — your password is never shared with us when you use these options.
securityPage.authMfaDetail: For extra peace of mind, you can enable two-factor authentication (2FA) using a TOTP app like Google Authenticator. This adds a second layer of protection to your account.
securityPage.authRlsDetail: Every database table is protected by Row Level Security (RLS). This means you can only ever access your own data — this is enforced at the database level, not just in our code.
securityPage.authJwtDetail: Your login sessions use JSON Web Tokens (JWT), which are short-lived and cryptographically signed. Sessions expire automatically, keeping your account safe even if you forget to log out.
securityPage.privacyExportDetail: You can download everything — all your memories, stories, and photos — as a JSON file with a ZIP of your media. Your data always belongs to you.
securityPage.privacyDeleteDetail: If you choose to delete your account, all your data is permanently removed. Deletion cascades through every table — nothing is left behind.
securityPage.privacyCookieDetail: We ask for your permission before setting any non-essential cookies. You can change your preferences at any time through our cookie consent controls.
securityPage.privacyNoTrackingLabel: No tracking, no ads, no data selling
securityPage.privacyNoTrackingDetail: We will never sell your data, show you advertisements, or track you across the web. Your memories are private, and that is a promise.
securityPage.privacyLegacyDetail: You can designate trusted family members as legacy contacts for digital inheritance. When the time comes, your memories can be passed on to the people you choose.
securityPage.backupDailyDetail: Your data is backed up automatically every day. In the unlikely event of a problem, we can restore your palace to its most recent state.
securityPage.backupPitrDetail: Our database supports point-in-time recovery, meaning we can restore data to any moment within the retention window — not just the last backup.
securityPage.backupReplicatedDetail: Files are stored with redundancy across multiple availability zones. Even if one data center has issues, your memories remain safe and accessible.
securityPage.commitmentTitle: Your memories are meant to last generations.
securityPage.commitmentBody: If you have questions about how we handle your data, or if you want to exercise any of your rights under GDPR, please contact us at
securityPage.ctaDescription: Your memories deserve a safe, beautiful home. Get started for free — no credit card required.
securityPage.footerCopyright: The Memory Palace. Preserve your memories for eternity.
securityPage.cookiePrefDetail: Allow non-essential cookies to help us improve your experience. We never use cookies for advertising or tracking across websites.

cookieSettings.pageDescription: Control which cookies are used on your device. We respect your privacy and only use cookies to improve your experience — never for advertising or cross-site tracking.
cookieSettings.whatAreCookiesBody: Cookies are small text files stored on your device that help us remember your preferences and improve how the app works. The Memory Palace uses cookies sparingly and transparently. Below you can see exactly which categories we use and control your consent for each.
cookieSettings.essentialDescription: These cookies are required for the app to function. They handle session management, authentication, and security. Without them, you would not be able to sign in or use the Memory Palace.
cookieSettings.preferencesDescription: These cookies remember your choices such as language, theme, and persona settings. Disabling them means these preferences will not persist between sessions.
cookieSettings.analyticsDescription: We use Web Vitals to measure page performance and loading times. These cookies help us understand how the app performs so we can make it faster and more reliable. No personal data is collected.
cookieSettings.alwaysOnNote: Essential cookies cannot be disabled as they are required for the app to function.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.whoWeAreText1: The Memory Palace is operated from Belgium. We built this app to help you preserve and share your most precious memories — safely and privately. We are committed to protecting your personal data in full compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable Belgian and EU law.
privacy.whoWeAreText2: For any privacy-related questions, you can always reach us at:
privacy.whatWeCollectIntro: We only collect what we need to provide you with a great experience. Here is what we gather:
privacy.whatWeCollectItem1Text: your name, email address, and profile photo when you create an account.
privacy.whatWeCollectItem2Text: the photos, videos, stories, and other content you upload to your Memory Palace. This is the heart of the service.
privacy.whatWeCollectItem3Text: basic details like your browser type and screen size, so we can make the app look and work its best on your device.
privacy.howWeUseIntro: We use your data solely to provide and improve The Memory Palace. Specifically:
privacy.howWeUseItem1: To store, organize, and display your memories in your palace.
privacy.howWeUseItem2: To authenticate your account and keep it secure.
privacy.howWeUseItem3: To send you important service-related messages (such as email confirmations, security alerts, or legacy notifications).
privacy.howWeUseItem4: To improve the app based on your feedback and support requests.
privacy.howWeUseNeverMid: use your data for advertising, and we will
privacy.howWeUseLegalBasisIntro: We process your personal data under the following legal bases:
privacy.howWeUseLegalBasisItem1Text: storing your memories, account management, and providing core app functionality.
privacy.howWeUseLegalBasisItem2Text: AI-powered features (tagging, context generation, interviews, bust generation), optional cookies, and marketing communications.
privacy.howWeUseLegalBasisItem3Text: security monitoring, abuse prevention, and service improvement based on aggregated usage patterns.
privacy.howWeUseLegalBasisItem4Text: responding to lawful requests from authorities and maintaining required records.
privacy.whereStoredIntro: Your core data is stored within the European Union:
privacy.whereStoredItem1Post: . Your memories, profile data, and account information all live here, encrypted at rest with AES-256.
privacy.whereStoredItem2Text: Vercel, with servers in the EU. All connections are encrypted with TLS 1.2+.
privacy.whereStoredItem3Text: Supabase Storage (EU region), encrypted at rest. Your photos and media are only accessible through authenticated, time-limited links.
privacy.whereStoredCrossBorderText: some data is processed by US-based services: Anthropic (AI features), Stripe (payments), Resend (email), and — when you explicitly connect them — Google (Google Photos), Dropbox, Microsoft (OneDrive), and Box. Additionally, Vercel and Supabase are US-headquartered companies with EU data processing regions. All cross-border transfers are protected by Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) and each provider's data processing agreement, ensuring your data remains protected to EU standards.
privacy.whereStoredOutro: Your database and files are hosted in the EU and protected by European data protection laws. Where data is processed outside the EU, appropriate safeguards are in place.
privacy.whoWeShareTitle: 5. Who We Share Your Data With
privacy.whoWeShareIntroPost: sell, rent, or trade your personal data. Period. We only share data with a small number of trusted service providers who help us run The Memory Palace:
privacy.whoWeShareItem1Text: — database hosting, file storage, and authentication.
privacy.whoWeShareItem3Text: — sending transactional emails (such as password resets and notifications).
privacy.whoWeShareItem4Text: — processing payments securely. We never see or store your credit card details.
privacy.whoWeShareItem5Text: — powering AI features such as memory tagging, interview summaries, and context generation. Data sent to Anthropic may include interview responses, memory titles and descriptions, file metadata, and image thumbnails. Anthropic does not use API data to train its models by default and processes data in accordance with its data processing agreement.
privacy.whoWeShareItem6Text: — optional integration for importing photos. Data is only transferred when you explicitly connect your Google account and initiate an import.
privacy.whoWeShareItem7Text: — optional integration for importing photos and files. Data is only transferred when you explicitly connect your Dropbox account and initiate an import.
privacy.whoWeShareItem8Text: — optional integration for importing photos and files. Data is only transferred when you explicitly connect your Microsoft account and initiate an import.
privacy.whoWeShareItem9Text: — optional integration for importing files. Data is only transferred when you explicitly connect your Box account and initiate an import.
privacy.whoWeShareItem10Text: — authentication provider for Sign in with Apple. Only used when you choose to sign in with your Apple ID. Apple receives your authentication request but does not access your Memory Palace data.
privacy.whoWeShareOutro: All these providers are bound by data processing agreements and comply with GDPR. The cloud storage integrations (Google, Dropbox, Microsoft, Box) are entirely optional and only process your data when you explicitly connect them. Beyond these providers, your data is only shared when:
privacy.whoWeShareCondition1Text: when you invite family members to view rooms or memories, the shared content becomes accessible to those people.
privacy.whoWeShareCondition2Text: we may disclose data if required by law or valid legal process.
privacy.yourRightsIntro: Under the GDPR (Articles 15-20 and beyond), you have strong rights over your personal data. Here is what you can do:
privacy.yourRightsItem1Text: request a complete copy of everything we hold about you.
privacy.yourRightsItem2Text: download all your memories, stories, and photos as a JSON file with a ZIP of your media — directly from your account settings.
privacy.yourRightsItem3Text: update or fix any information that is inaccurate or incomplete.
privacy.yourRightsItem4Text: request complete deletion of your account and all associated data. When you delete your account, everything is permanently removed.
privacy.yourRightsItem5Text: receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format that you can take to another service.
privacy.yourRightsItem6Text: object to the processing of your personal data at any time.
privacy.yourRightsItem7Text: change your mind about optional processing at any time.
privacy.yourRightsItem8Text: request that we limit how we use your data while a dispute or verification is pending.
privacy.automatedDecisionText: Our AI features (memory tagging, context generation, interview summarization, and bust generation) use automated processing to generate suggestions. These features are entirely optional, require your explicit consent, and do not produce decisions with legal or similarly significant effects. You can disable AI features at any time in your account settings.
privacy.yourRightsOutroPre: To exercise any of these rights, email us at
privacy.yourRightsOutroPost: . We will respond within 30 days, as required by law.
privacy.dataBreachNotificationText: In the event of a data breach that poses a risk to your rights, we will notify the relevant supervisory authority within 72 hours and inform affected users without undue delay, as required by GDPR Articles 33 and 34.
privacy.retentionIntro: Your data is kept for as long as your account is active. You are in control:
privacy.retentionItem1Text: your memories and data stay safely stored for as long as you use The Memory Palace.
privacy.retentionItem2Text: when you delete your account, all personal data and uploaded content is permanently removed immediately upon request. Backup copies are purged according to our infrastructure provider's retention schedule.
privacy.retentionItem3Text: if you have set up legacy contacts, your memories will be delivered to your chosen family members according to your settings. This is entirely optional and under your control.
privacy.retentionItem4Text: basic server logs (for security and debugging purposes) may be retained for up to 12 months after account deletion.
privacy.cookiesIntro: We keep cookies to an absolute minimum:
privacy.cookiesItem1Text: required for logging in and core functionality (authentication session, CSRF protection). These cannot be disabled, as the app would not work without them.
privacy.cookiesItem2Text: store your language preference and display settings. These are optional but improve your experience.
privacy.cookiesOutroPost: use analytics cookies, advertising cookies, or third-party trackers of any kind.
privacy.childrenText: The Memory Palace is designed for adults and is not intended for children under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from anyone under 16. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us and we will promptly remove it.
privacy.changesText: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. When we make significant changes, we will notify you by email or with a clear notice inside the app. Your continued use of The Memory Palace after any changes means you accept the updated policy.
privacy.contactIntro: If you have questions about this privacy policy, want to exercise your rights, or simply want to know more about how we protect your data, we would love to hear from you:
privacy.contactOutro: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Belgian Data Protection Authority (Gegevensbeschermingsautoriteit) if you believe your rights have been violated.
